title: Parent-Root Mirror Routing Normalization
objective: Normalize the still-current-looking parent-root umbrella entry surfaces after standalone repo cutover so the surrounding `C:/APEX Platform` shell is explicitly historical or umbrella-only rather than a competing current operator boundary.
dependency_note: Packet 100 corrected the repo-owned current-truth authority chain inside the standalone repo boundary. The next adjacent defect sat outside that chain in the parent-root umbrella shell: the top-level README and aligned mirror docs still presented the retired parent root too close to current operator truth, and one surviving `.claude` task note still lacked explicit historical framing.
execution_scope: Update only the parent-root umbrella README and aligned overview/status mirrors that still need explicit historical or umbrella framing after cutover.
Add historical framing to the surviving parent-root `.claude` git-task note.
Leave deeper packet chronology and older parent-root archives intact except for explicit disclaimers that preserve them as history rather than current routing.
success_criteria: The parent-root README, overview, and status entry sections no longer present `C:/APEX Platform` as the live publication boundary for active Apex Ops repo work.
The parent-root status mirror explicitly marks the preserved packet chronology as historical state rather than current boundary guidance.
The surviving `.claude` task note carries an explicit historical demotion note.
Repo-owned status routing records the mirror-normalization closure and points the next lane at deeper historical-demotion residue rather than umbrella entry-surface drift.
validation_commands: Get-Content README.md,PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md,PROJECT_STATUS.md -TotalCount 40 | Select-String -Pattern 'remains the publication boundary','current git publication boundary','remains the canonical publication boundary'

validation_results.parent_root_live_routing_check: pass in the top live-routing sections of README.md, PROJECT_OVERVIEW.md, and PROJECT_STATUS.md

next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to the remaining deeper historical-demotion and provenance-routing residue beyond the now-normalized parent-root entry surfaces.
